title: CSMCRI Recruitment 2026 - Apply for 02 Project Associate I Posts
description: Central Salt and Marine Chemicals Research Institute (CSMCRI) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for 02 Project Associate I Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the M.Sc can grab this chance and apply for the M.Sc can grab this chance and apply for the CSMCRI Recruitment 2026 .
